caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones sits in a podcast studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. To his left, a white wall features a recurring logo with the words "HUSTLE" and five stars. Behind him, a screen displays the text "BOSS TALK 101". In the lower portion of the frame, a logo for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears on the left, and the text "BOSS TALK 101" is visible on the right. The man's t-shirt has the words "CHECK IT" printed on the front. Across the sequence, the man shifts his gaze and head position; he starts by looking forward, then turns his head slightly to the right, and finally looks back and forth while speaking. His facial expressions change as he interacts with someone off-screen.
